columns.downstream_use: Account identification — lead sheets, classification, exception attribution

issues.remediation: Use column mapping to manually assign the missing column(s), or rename columns to standard names (Account, Debit, Credit).
issues.downstream_impact: All diagnostic tools depend on correct column mapping. Incorrect detection causes miscalculated balances, failed ratio analysis, and unreliable anomaly detection across every downstream report.

preflight.rendered_conclusion: The trial balance file (tb_hartwell.docx) achieved a Readiness Score of 80.0/100 — assessed as Review Required. The file contains 37 accounts and presents 1 issue that must be resolved before downstream diagnostic testing can be relied upon: (1) Required column(s) not detected: credit. Confirm the column mapping or use the override feature before proceeding. The high-severity finding(s) above invalidates downstream test results; do not record conclusions against the affected figures until the issues are remediated and the file is re-processed.
